untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of price clustering at round numbers (0.00, 0.25, 0.50, 0.10, 0.05) and placement of limit orders offset_from_round_number by 2 ticks. No allowed indicator directly measures round-number clustering intensity or supports order placement logic. Would require custom clustering detection algorithm not available in standard indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using ATR for price increment fractional size, hvol_20 for volatility threshold, and vol_ratio_20 for volume percentile constraints. Exit conditions approximated using pivot support/resistance as proxy for round-number support/resistance breaks. However, the core microstructure signal (order book clustering exploitation via offset limit orders) cannot be reliably translated without order book depth data and clustering detection algorithms.
